sectionSubtitle: Eight capabilities that bring the precision of institutional quantitative finance to systematic traders and developers building on the Heady AI platform.

features.title: CSL-Gated Signal Engine
features.description: Every HeadyFinance signal passes through a seven-gate CSL validation pipeline: THRESHOLD gates filter noise, AMPLIFY gates strengthen high-conviction setups, SUPPRESS gates dampen contradicting signals, ROUTE gates assign directional bias, MERGE gates aggregate multi-timeframe confluence, SPLIT gates generate long/short pairs, and OBSERVE gates log signal state for audit trails. Only signals that clear all applicable gates reach publication.

features.title: φ-Scaled Risk Models
features.description: Position sizing, stop-loss placement, and profit target ratios are all derived from φ (1.618…) and the Fibonacci sequence — the same mathematical ratios that appear in natural market structure. φ-scaled position sizing produces risk/reward ratios of 1:1.618, 1:2.618, and 1:4.236, matching the natural harmonic expansion levels that institutional traders use for profit-taking.

features.title: Real-Time Market Data
features.description: Pro and Quant subscribers receive real-time Level 2 market data across equities (NYSE, NASDAQ, CBOE), crypto (major CEXs via aggregated feed), and forex (top 28 pairs) via WebSocket streaming with < 50ms signal publication latency from data receipt to alert delivery. Research tier receives end-of-day data with a 15-minute delay.

features.title: Backtesting Framework
features.description: The HeadyFinance backtesting engine runs walk-forward Monte Carlo analysis across 10,000+ scenario paths using historical tick data from 2010 to present. Test any combination of signal types, risk models, and asset universes with realistic transaction cost modeling (slippage, commissions, market impact), and export results as tearsheets, JSON, or CSV for further analysis.

features.title: Multi-Asset Support
features.description: HeadyFinance covers equities (S&P 500, Russell 2000, global ADRs), cryptocurrency (BTC, ETH, top 50 by market cap), forex (G10 + EM pairs), and equity options (implied volatility surface modeling). All asset classes share a unified API schema, enabling cross-asset portfolio construction and correlation-adjusted risk management.

features.title: Portfolio Optimization
features.description: Modern Portfolio Theory meets geometric intelligence. HeadyFinance's portfolio optimizer runs mean-variance optimization with φ-scaled weight constraints, Black-Litterman factor views from CSL signal consensus, and CVaR risk constraints derived from Monte Carlo simulation. Generate efficient frontier analysis and optimal weight allocations in seconds.

features.title: Risk-Adjusted Returns
features.description: Every HeadyFinance signal includes a complete risk-adjusted performance profile: Sharpe ratio, Sortino ratio, Calmar ratio, maximum drawdown, and win rate — all backtested over 5-year and 10-year lookback windows. Signal quality scores are normalized to a 0–1 CSL confidence value, making cross-signal comparison objective and consistent.

features.title: Quant API Access
features.description: Full programmatic access to every HeadyFinance capability via a REST and WebSocket API. Endpoints cover signal subscription, historical data retrieval, backtesting job submission, portfolio optimization, and risk model parameter customization. SDKs available for Python, TypeScript, and R. Rate limits are φ-scaled by plan tier.
